requirement_topic.en: Switzerland Market-Side Conformity and Service Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 瑞士市场侧合规与服务框架
requirement_topic.zht: 瑞士市場側合規與服務框架

summary.en: Swiss chargers should be assessed under a project-specific market-side path where import clearance, customs classification, charging-service obligations, and operational data obligations are handled by the importer, operator, and network context. Switzerland is not in the EEA, so CE acceptance relies on bilateral MRA and Swiss-adopted routes rather than automatic EEA inference.
summary.zh: 瑞士充电设备应按项目特定的市场侧路径评估：进口清关、海关归类、充电服务义务和运行数据义务由进口商、运营方及网络环境共同处理。瑞士非EEA成员，因此CE接收基于双边互认和瑞士采标路径，而不能直接按EEA推断。
summary.zht: 瑞士充電設備應按項目特定的市場側路徑評估：進口清關、海關歸類、充電服務義務和運行數據義務由進口商、營運方及網路環境共同處理。瑞士非EEA成員，因此CE接收基於雙邊互認及瑞士採標路徑，而不能直接按EEA推斷。

standards_or_laws: Switzerland import customs rules for electrical equipment
ElCom framework on network tariffs and consumer-facing charging operations
Local project procurement and contractual requirements

summary.en: China product documentation can include CCC where applicable, GB/T 18487.1, GB/T 20234/27930, and domestic market readiness packages. These are useful for technical preparation but do not replace Switzerland-specific market-path obligations or ElCom-related operations checks.
summary.zh: 中国产品资料可包括CCC适用性文件、GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234/27930及国内市场准备包，这些有助于技术准备，但不能替代瑞士市场路径义务或ElCom相关运营检查。
summary.zht: 中國產品資料可包括CCC適用性文件、GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234/27930及國內市場準備包，這些有助於技術準備，但不能替代瑞士市場路徑義務或ElCom相關營運檢查。

standards_or_laws: China export and market documentation for EV chargers

gap.en: Exporters should prepare Switzerland-facing market documentation by model, owner, importer, public or private charging scope, pricing and payment architecture, data and reporting requirements, and service operation responsibilities before claiming market readiness.
gap.zh: 出口商应按型号、业主、进口商、公共/私有充电范围、计费与支付架构、数据和报告要求及服务运营责任准备瑞士市场端文件后再宣称就绪。
gap.zht: 出口商應按型號、業主、進口商、公共／私有充電範圍、計費與支付架構、數據和報告要求及服務營運責任準備瑞士市場端文件後再宣稱就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Project- and service-specific. Mandatory where market operation, network integration, and local contract requirements apply.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic market or CCC status does not itself satisfy Switzerland-facing market-side obligations.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product technical files do not replace Switzerland market-side obligations. Verify ElCom-related operations requirements and import-route documentation for each deployment model.
compliance_verdict.zh: 产品技术文件不能替代瑞士市场侧义务。每个投放模型都应核实与ElCom相关的运营要求和进口路径文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: 產品技術文件不能替代瑞士市場側義務。每個投放模型都應核實與ElCom相關的營運要求和進口路徑文件。
